textByHash.2fcfbbc5887cd507e9f0e5acc7d4d367de6fd12b: You look like a man that could use a mace. Finest weapons around! Want to take a look?
textByHash.862863ae8d0b805d77e1a198d846f82bb934dc87: You look like a woman that could use a mace. Finest weapons around! Want to take a look?
textByHash.1032e2f063f8a1af20df9b1df0731b55720f2d16: Your loss, I suppose. You won't find a weapon like a mace!
